name: Sensodyne Pronamel
reason: Good option for enamel protection and sensitivity support during orthodontic treatment.

name: Colgate Cavity Protection
reason: Simple fluoride toothpaste focused on cavity prevention, which is useful for braces.

name: Boka Nano-Hydroxyapatite Toothpaste
reason: Hydroxyapatite-based option for enamel support, but mineral-source quality should still be considered.

name: Tom's of Maine Fluoride Toothpaste
reason: Fluoride-based option with a relatively simple ingredient profile.
